## Summary

Adds the public `/black-box-problem` route and canonical brand doctrine for RevisionGrade’s readiness positioning.

## Changed files

- `app/black-box-problem/page.tsx`
- `docs/brand/black-box-readiness.md`
- `docs/brand/README.md`
- `components/HeaderNav.jsx`
- `components/SiteFooter.jsx`

## Scope

Public route, navigation discovery, footer trust link, and brand documentation only. No auth, pricing, runtime governance, evaluation pipeline, scoring, worker, Supabase, dashboard, or Revise/workbench behavior changes.

## Validation

Recommended:

```bash
npm run build
```
